title: OneLight
body:
# OneLight
It is a texture pack based on the game **Oneshot** that brings elements from the game and transforms the world giving it the atmosphere of Oneshot, mainly a combination of the Glen and the Barrens for the overworld.
It changes blocks, items, GUI and sounds, some from the original game and some original textures.

![OneLight banner](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1074018527654199356/1093704691080253471/Banner.png)

## Credits
Thanks to [u/Sergei_the_soviertski](https://www.reddit.com/user/Sergei_the_sovietski/) for original texture pack!

GUI, blocks, items and changes made by [u/AnotherUniverse0](https://www.reddit.com/user/AnotherUniverse0) - xZpookyx

Thanks to Future Cat LLC ([@girakacheezer](https://twitter.com/girakacheezer), [@nightmargin](https://twitter.com/nightmargin) and [@elizagamedev](https://twitter.com/elizagamedev)) for making Oneshot and their textures!
